"'''Equals & Opposites'''" is a story from ''[[Star Wars Tales 21]]'', collected in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 6]]'' and set shortly after ''Force Heretic I: Remnant'' during the [[New Jedi Order era]].

==Plot summary==
In the story, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Alpha Blue]] operative [[Jan Ors]] join forces with [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Pallin]] of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] and his [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] on the planet [[Ord Sedra]] in the [[Imperial Remnant|Remnant]], which has been conquered by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] and a [[Peace Brigade]] force under local leader [[Tarneel]]. As a secondary plotline, longtime partners Kyle Katarn and Jan Ors wrestle with questions of love and possible [[Marriage/Legends|marriage]] in a time of war.

==Development==
During production of ''Equals & Opposites'' the tale was originally titled ''Flair for the Dramatic''.
